problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: If Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor is applied to reversed, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
